form.providerCard.truthCopy: Defaults come from the canonical catalog projection. OpenRouter pricing is a reference baseline, ZeroEval is a secondary reference, and explicit pricing you set still wins.
nodes.sections.onboarding.title: Add from canonical catalog
nodes.sections.onboarding.description: Start with active providers that already have canonical model coverage, recommended defaults, and pricing references. Transport-only presets remain connectable, but stay out of the primary path unless explicitly shown.
nodes.sections.onboarding.empty: All active catalog providers are already configured, or there are no additional onboarding candidates right now.
nodes.sections.onboarding.legacyNote: Need a deprecated, legacy, or transport-only preset? Show transport-only presets in Add Node or the Provider Catalog.
nodes.sections.configured.title: Configured upstreams
nodes.sections.configured.description: Keep live node configuration separate from catalog onboarding, while still showing catalog match, coverage, and trust signals when a node maps cleanly to a provider.
catalogPage.detail.catalogTruthCopy: Active catalog rows have trusted model projection for default browsing. Transport-only presets remain connectable as nodes, but stay hidden by default when model or pricing truth is not trusted. Explicit operator pricing still overrides catalog references.
form.pricing.alignedEstimateRow: โหลดราคาประมาณที่ align กับ OpenRouter สำหรับโมเดลนี้แล้ว

form.help.customAuthHeader: Provider key จะถูกใส่ใน header นี้ตอนส่งคำขอ Dashboard API จะไม่ส่งค่า Provider key กลับมา
providerHealth.title: Provider Health Dashboard
providerHealth.description: แสดง availability, latency, error rate, probe, circuit และคำเตือน pricing source ตาม Workspace โดยไม่มี raw content หรือ Provider key
providerHealth.error: โหลด Provider health ไม่สำเร็จ
providerHealth.noData: ไม่มีข้อมูล
providerHealth.privacy: เฉพาะ metadata: ไม่เก็บ prompts, responses, raw headers, Provider keys, media bytes, source code, diffs หรือ tool payloads
catalogPage.detail.hiddenReasonFallback: Hidden from the default catalog because model or pricing truth requires operator review.
